name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability for Raji
title: "feat: <one-line summary>"
labels: ["type:feat", "triage"]
assignees: []

## Problem / user pain

<!-- What is the user struggling with today?  Keep it concrete — a real scenario beats an
     abstract idea every time. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- How would Raji solve this?  Flow the user experiences end-to-end (voice command →
     behavior → feedback).  Hinglish example commands are welcome. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about and why you rejected them. -->

## Scope check (FEATURES-100.md)

- [ ] This feature is in the locked 100-feature roadmap (cite feature ID)
- [ ] This feature is in MVP (18 features) — cite scope note
- [ ] This feature is net-new — propose which existing feature to drop to make room
      (per D-23: feature creep is prohibited)

## Platform impact

- [ ] Android Lite (Play Store)
- [ ] Android Pro (sideload)
- [ ] Desktop (Windows)
- [ ] Desktop (Linux)
- [ ] Backend / Edge Functions

## Non-goals

<!-- Explicitly out of scope for this request. -->

## Success criteria

<!-- Measurable signals that this is working.  P50 latency, conversion, retention, etc. -->

## Privacy / policy concerns

- [ ] New permission required  <!-- which one, and is it Play-policy safe? -->
- [ ] Touches audio / contacts / SMS / location / accessibility
- [ ] Sends new data to backend — DPDP consent flow updated?

## Additional context
